manifest.title: Welcome to Argus Presenter
manifest.summary: A tiny domain-neutral module that demonstrates sections, beats, and the discover→validate→load flow.

opts.speaker: Argus
opts.text: Welcome. This deck is a content module: a portable set of beats you deliver one at a time.

opts.title: What is a beat?
opts.body: A beat is one screen the audience sees — narration, a card, a choice, a roll. Sections group beats for the outline.

opts.title: That's the loop
opts.body: Discover a module → validate → load → deliver beat by beat → end returns to branding.

opts.title: Welcome to Argus Presenter
opts.body: This is a module title page — shown on Load, before the presentation starts. Press Start to begin, or Home to return here.
